meaning: n.贺胥黎,生物学家,Aldous的祖父
examples: Huxley speculated that a coat of hair would insulate against loss of body heat and might streamline the body to reduce drag in flight.
Darwin and Huxley supported the accuracy of John Joly's calculation of Earth's age because it agree with their view of how long evolution had been in progress.
Huxley reasoned that flying vertebrates must have been warm-blooded because flying implies a high rate of metabolism, which in turn implies a high internal temperature.
Alex Huxley (41), Joe Carrasco (37) and Nick Williams (33) all chipped in for Oswestry's 171-8.
In 1894, English novelist Aldous Huxley, author of "Brave New World, " was born in Godalming, England.
